utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 top-level items. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: Required: physical and mental health insurance with costs. Provided: physical with named plans for Raj and for Anita_Aryan_Priya and a combined cost (€320/month); mental with a family plan and cost (€130/month). This is fully specified with costs.
- property_coverage: Required: home/contents insurance with costs. Provided: home_contents plan and cost (€95/month). This satisfies the requirement (home/contents) with costs.
- travel_coverage: Required: travel insurance with costs. Provided: family travel plan and cost (€110/month). Fully specified.
- additional_services: Required: any enhancement services with costs. Provided: mentions services but explicitly says not detailed as separate line items, and no costs are provided. This is not fully specified.
- total_budget: Required: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided: monthly (€655/month) only; no annual breakdown. Therefore not fully specified.
Thus, 3 items are fully specified out of 5.
